alkylation reagent: 15 μL of 100 mM iodoacetamide (7.5 mM final concentration)
alkylation concentration: 15 μL of 100 mM iodoacetamide (7.5 mM final concentration)
cleavage agent: 5 μL of trypsin in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
enrichment method: Neutravidin agarose beads (50 μL) were added to the samples
labeling: the peptides were reconstituted in 25 μL of 2% acetonitrile in water with 0.5% trifluoroacetic acid for LC-MS/MS analysis
reduction reagent: 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) in phosphate buffered saline (PBS)
reduction concentration: 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) in phosphate buffered saline (PBS)
